The '''''Peacekeeper''''' was one of three [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruisers]] present at the [[Battle of Nar Shaddaa (4 BBY)|Battle of Nar Shaddaa]]. It was commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Reldo Dovlis]]. When [[Xaverri]] started her illusion of a vast [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] fleet rising from the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] to engage the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]], ''Peacekeeper'' was deceived into thinking that the fleet was real. By the time they had figured out the fleet was merely an illusion, several real smuggler ships and a [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] of [[Drea Renthal]]'s [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] had arrived and began peppering the stern with [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]]. Before long, the shields had collapsed and the engines had overloaded, sending the Dreadnaught spinning out of control towards [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]. Captain Dovlis had no time to fix the situation or order an evacuation. In a matter of moments, ''Peacekeeper'' impacted the [[Planetary shield/Legends|planetary shield]] surrounding Nar Shaddaa and was obliterated.
